final_decision.exact_quote: These steps are intended for Claude for Education administrators and Learning Management Systems (LMS) administrators.
final_decision.justification: [NORMAL_FAQ] grounded generation; retrieval_score=0.98; verifier=pass; product_area_snapped=Claude for Education->general_support
final_decision.response: To set up a Claude LTI key for your students, you need to follow the steps outlined for administrators in the documentation. First, sign in to Canvas as an administrator and navigate to Admin -> Developer Keys to create a Claude LTI Developer Key. After that, you can install the Claude LTI as an app in Canvas. Please ensure you have the required admin permissions to perform these actions.
